name: Child education plan vs direct investment
description: User considering child plan and wants analysis

input.message: My daughter is 3 years old. An agent is pushing HDFC Life Youngstar Super Premium for ₹50,000/year. He says she'll get ₹25 lakhs when she turns 18. Is this a good plan or should I invest directly in SIP?

notes: Must calculate IRR of child plan (typically 5-7%). Must compare with term + SIP strategy. Must flag that child plans have high charges. Must recommend adequate term cover for parent separately.
